title: He Thief, She Thief
writer: Luigi Zampa, Pasquale Festa Campanile, Massimo Franciosa
actors: Alberto Sordi, Sylva Koscina, Ettore Manni
plot: Cencio, a roman pilferer, periodically is in prison. He meets Cesira that soon become his partner in crime. With Cesira's help Cencio try the big hit to a jewelery. But the lucky break is over.
